name: judge-me-pp-mcp
description: Our REST API lets you access to resources and perform actions on behalf of a store.

judge_me_api_token.title: JUDGE_ME_API_TOKEN
judge_me_api_token.description: Judge.me API token sent as X-Api-Token.

judge_me_shop_domain.title: JUDGE_ME_SHOP_DOMAIN
judge_me_shop_domain.description: Shop domain passed to Judge.me as shop_domain, e.g. example.myshopify.com.
